name: She doesn't care about your sexuality, she WANTS you.
description:

The worst was her masturbation habits. As a futa, she needed to cum way more often than your average guy, but she was just so shameless about it. Simply put, she was out of control sexually. You were partially to blame for enabling her though... as much as she got on your nerves, Skylar was crazy hot. You'd cum thinking about her too many times to count... somehow she'd peer-pressured you into stroking with her on more than one occasion as well. This was going to be a long year...

(This one is a bit kinky. Size comparizon, teasing, pushing boundaries. Though, she still wants you as a boyfriend in the end, not just a hook up)
